goal: Lay out an ABB IRB 6700 bin-picking cell from a CATIA STEP fixture — GUI-first workflow, TCP frames at pick/place points, cycle-time estimate under 45 s.
thoughts: Kenji distrusts 'here is a Python script'. Offer GUI-first flow: asset browser drag-in for ABB, CAD importer for the STEP file (mm->m unit conversion matters — STEP is almost always mm), TCP frames as child Xforms created via GUI gizmo. Cycle time: Isaac Sim has NO built-in Gantt — be honest, propose script-to-CSV-to-matplotlib. Use factory vocabulary (TCP, cycle, fixture), not 'prim' / 'OmniGraph'. Explicitly acknowledge the VC Gantt gap.
code:
# 1. Find shipped ABB IRB 6700 asset (asset browser path, Kenji drag-drops)
catalog_search(query="ABB IRB 6700 235/2.65 USD Isaac Sim shipped asset")
nucleus_browse(path="omniverse://localhost/NVIDIA/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Isaac/Robots/ABB/")

# 2. STEP import via CAD importer (GUI: File > Import > STEP)
#    Critical: set length unit mm -> m at import, NOT after
import_robot(
    urdf_path="<ABSOLUTE_STEP_PATH>",    # /home/kenji/cells/line4/bin_fixture.step
    dest_path="/World/Cell/BinFixture",
    fix_base=True,
    merge_fixed_joints=True
)

# 3. TCP frames at pick and place as child Xforms under robot flange
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/IRB_6700/tool0/tcp_pick",
    prim_type="Xform",
    attributes={"xformOp:translate": ("<TX>","<TY>","<TZ>"),
                 "xformOp:orient":    ("<QW>","<QX>","<QY>","<QZ>"),
                 "xformOpOrder": ["xformOp:translate","xformOp:orient"]}
)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/IRB_6700/tool0/tcp_place", prim_type="Xform", attributes={"...": "..."})

# 4. Cycle-time measurement — honest path, no built-in Gantt
lookup_knowledge(query="Isaac Sim cycle time logging joint trajectory timeline CSV matplotlib Gantt")
# Concrete approach: timestamp each waypoint transition in a small logger,
# emit CSV, render Gantt in matplotlib. Isaac Sim is continuous-physics-first;
# Visual Components and Plant Sim have native Gantt -- Isaac Sim does not.
failure_modes: STEP imported at mm scale — robot cell is 1000x oversized, reach study lies
Threaded holes lost on STEP tesselation — normal CAD-to-mesh limitation, flag it
Claiming Isaac Sim has a built-in Gantt — it does not, Kenji will catch the lie
Jumping to Python motion-planning script as the primary path — Kenji disengages
